methods.name: cdk_vpc_module.AddRouteOptions.__init__
documentation:
---
param destination_cidr_block: 'IPv4 range this route applies to. Default: ''0.0.0.0/0'''
param destination_ipv6_cidr_block: 'IPv6 range this route applies to. Default: - Uses
  IPv6'
param enables_internet_connectivity: 'Whether this route will enable internet connectivity.
  If true, this route will be added before any AWS resources that depend on internet
  connectivity in the VPC will be created. Default: false'
param existing_vpc_peering_route_key: true
param router_id: true
param router_type: What type of router to route this traffic to.
---

methods.name: cdk_vpc_module.AddRouteOptions.router_type
documentation: What type of router to route this traffic to.

methods.name: cdk_vpc_module.AddRouteOptions.destination_cidr_block
documentation:
IPv4 range this route applies to.

:default: '0.0.0.0/0'

methods.name: cdk_vpc_module.AddRouteOptions.destination_ipv6_cidr_block
documentation:
IPv6 range this route applies to.

:default: - Uses IPv6

methods.name: cdk_vpc_module.AddRouteOptions.enables_internet_connectivity
documentation:
Whether this route will enable internet connectivity.

If true, this route will be added before any AWS resources that depend
on internet connectivity in the VPC will be created.

:default: false
